response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on the Windows platform, which is mandatory for this role. While they have some C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), their recent work has been primarily in Node.js, TypeScript, and other languages, with no evidence of recent or significant C++/Windows development. Their domain expertise in capital markets is also absent.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in full-stack development and test-driven practices
Proven ability to work in diverse technical environments and rapidly learn new technologies
Active open-source contributions and technical leadership in community initiatives
concerns: Insufficient recent C++/Windows development experience (mandatory for this role)
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains
Lacks required SQL Server/Oracle expertise, with MongoDB as the only database mentioned

key_factors.factor: Capital Markets / Fixed Income domain knowledge
